title: Another. (Upon M. Ben. Jonson. Epig.)
content:
Thou had'st the wreath before, now take the tree,
    That henceforth none be laurel-crown'd but thee.
meaning:
"Another. (Upon M. Ben. Jonson. Epig.)" is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
